calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-13-2004 Off Calendar

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-01-2004 Continued To Aug-20-04 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212

Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Jul-08-2004 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up hearing this day.
Commissioner Sue Kaplan Clerk: Marta Vallejo, CSR: Patricia J. VanSteenberge.

Mark C. Le Clerc, Esq. for Plaintiff: Jeff Wells Slattery,
Plaintiff also present, was sworn & examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, plaintiff's declarations, the Court rules in favor of the plaintiff: Jeff Wells Slattery and against the defendant: Israel Megerssa Ind/Dba Zebra Sound &/or Zebra Records.
Damages of $33,225.28
Prejudgment interest $2,436.73
Costs of $1,153.80
For the total of $36,815.81.
Judgment signed in open court.
